text: - **No API key** when OpenRouter models configured (`inject.rs:338-363`): emits `render_raw_reminder` (raw vector chunks, verbatim) as fallback — deterministic, no model. [...] - **Empty catalog but non-empty hits** (`inject.rs:804-813` → `render_hits_librarian`): renders raw chunks verbatim with `TITLE:` line — no LLM, so no paraphrase (`inject.rs:1010-1023`). [...] - **Timeout / compile error** (`inject.rs:483-539`): degrades to the same `fallback_block` (raw chunks) if any hits exist, else nothing.
